title: prunus glandulosa
intro: Prunus glandulosa, also known as the dwarf cherry or Chinese cherry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. The plant's bark, leaves, and flowers are used in traditional Chinese medicine, which is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, and possesses anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Prunus glandulosa is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and aid in the treatment of fever and digestive issues. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
